extraction.one_line_summary: HIGUITA attacked final 300m of hilltop finish to Zinal, beat teammate VLASOV for Bora 1-2 after RUBIO's solo bid failed in headwind
tactical_patterns: RUBIO solo move absorbed by PLAPP-led chase in headwind finish demonstrates elite TT pacing trumps climber attacks uphill
DENNIS never needed to pull despite wearing leader's jersey; KUSS did chase work revealing Jumbo's defensive captaincy uncertainty
HIGUITA's 300m acceleration on left side caught VLASOV by surprise despite being teammates, suggesting no pre-stage agreement
Bora extracted 1-2 without committing riders to chase, allowing PLAPP and domestiques to control while conserving leaders

rider_signals.HIGUITA Sergio: positive: Fourth win of season demonstrates consistent late-race punch, particularly on short steep gradients after hard stages
rider_signals.RUBIO Einer: positive: Strong enough to drop breakaway remnants and sustain solo effort despite headwind negating his advantage
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: positive: Second place on queen stage marks GC form arrival; willingness to finish behind teammate shows pragmatic racing
rider_signals.PLAPP Luke: positive: Australian champion's chase pacing calibrated perfectly to catch RUBIO without burning DENNIS or other GC riders
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: Dropped from lead group on queen stage signals alarming form collapse for defending champion
rider_signals.DENNIS Rohan: positive: Never needed to pull while defending lead, conserving energy for ITT finale on preferred terrain
rider_signals.SKUJIŅŠ Toms: positive: Secured KOM lead despite being dropped early, tactically astute to prioritize classification over stage result
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: neutral: Doing chase work for DENNIS suggests Jumbo uncertain who their true GC leader is mid-race
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: positive: Third place finish at age 19 on queen stage with 4000m elevation signals emerging grand tour potential
rider_signals.O'CONNOR Ben: neutral: Fourth place shake of head suggests missed opportunity despite strong result on preferred steep terrain
